steps.title: Read the coordinates
steps.content: The point is $(33,0)$. In this graph, the $x$-coordinate is Player 1's points, and the $y$-coordinate is Player 2's points.

steps.title: Interpret the point
steps.content: At $(33,0)$, Player 1 earns $33$ points and Player 2 earns $0$ points.

steps.title: Choose the matching statement
steps.content: The matching statement is: when Player 1 earns $33$ points, Player 2 will earn $0$ points. The answer is B.
